iteration_1_baseline.notes: docx-create lost 10pts on 'content' criterion: pandoc wrapped 'March 2026' across lines

changes_made: Replaced verbose SKILL.md (196 lines, 23KB) with focused version (170 lines, 8KB)
Removed all tracked changes, redlining, comments, and raw XML documentation (not needed for tasks)
Removed ooxml.md, docx-js.md, scripts/, ooxml/, LICENSE.txt supporting files
Added critical fix: pandoc text extraction now uses '--wrap=none' to prevent line wrapping at 72 chars
Added '-t plain' flag guidance for plain text extraction
Kept inline docx-js creation patterns and python-docx extraction patterns
Added '--wrap=none' to Common Mistakes to Avoid section
key_fix: The main issue was pandoc wrapping text at 72 characters by default, breaking 'March 2026' across two lines. Adding '--wrap=none' to pandoc commands fixed the content extraction test.
